phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è la sezione della frutta, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH lah seh-TSYOH-neh del-la FROOT-tah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the back on the left.

responses.english: At the back on the left.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora chiude il mercato, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah kay O-ra KYOO-day eel mer-KAH-to, per fa-VO-reh

likely_response.local: Alle diciassette, ma gli orari variano.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL-leh dee-chee-ah-SSEHT-teh MAH LY oh-RAH-ree vah-ree-AH-noh

responses.phonetic: AHL-leh dee-chee-ah-SSEHT-teh MAH LY oh-RAH-ree vah-ree-AH-noh
responses.local: Alle diciassette, ma gli orari variano.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa al chilo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAHN-toh KOH-stah al KEE-loh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the label.

responses.english: It is indicated on the label.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, il mercato è aperto oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, eel mer-KAH-toh eh ah-PEHR-toh OHD-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, posso pagare con la carta, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, POH-ssoh pah-GAH-reh kon lah KAR-tah, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, avete prodotti locali tipici, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah-VEH-teh pro-DOT-tee loh-KAH-leeh TEE-pee-chee, per fah-VOH-reh
